overview: Leverage Beledros Witherbloom’s spell-triggered mana acceleration and token generation to fuel Blech’s attack/death value and Pest Infestation’s massive trample swing, winning through overwhelming board presence and card advantage.
win_conditions: Pest Infestation is the primary finisher.
Cast it when you have 3+ creatures to sacrifice, swing with trample tokens, and draw into game-ending threats.

keep_criteria: Keep hands with 2-3 lands (including Beledros if possible), Blech, and early mana sources.
mulligan_criteria: Mulligan if you lack B/G mana, have no Blech/Beledros, or only single lands with no early plays.

early_game: Turn 1: Play a land, cast Blech if mana allows.
Turn 2: Attack with Blech or hold for value.
Turn 3: Cast Beledros Witherbloom, tap creatures for mana, and begin generating tokens on spell casts.
Sequence lands to ensure B/G mana by turn 2-3.
mid_game: Prioritize casting spells to trigger Beledros.
Manage mana to tap two creatures for three mana of any color to cast Pest Infestation.
Don't overcommit Blech if it can be removed for value.
Commit Blech to attack when safe or when you can follow up.
Hold back if the opponent has sweepers.
Use Beledros as both a mana source and a threat.
late_game: Pest Infestation is the primary finisher.
Cast it when you have 3+ creatures to sacrifice, swing with trample tokens, and draw into game-ending threats.
Go all-in when you have Beledros online, enough creatures to sacrifice for Pest Infestation, and the opponent has no sweepers or low life total.

sequencing_tips: Common mistake: Casting Pest Infestation without enough creatures to sacrifice, or dying to a sweeper before casting it.
Unique interaction: Beledros's mana ability can be activated in response to Blech dying to get the 2/2 token, or to cast Pest Infestation.
Don't tap Beledros's creatures if you need to cast spells to trigger it.

matchups.advice: Cast Blech/Beledros on the opponent's turn or with protection. Use Pest Infestation's card draw to out-value counters.
Use Beledros to accelerate. Prioritize early Blech to pressure. Don't let them stabilize.
Hold interaction for Blech/Beledros. Use Pest Infestation to stabilize the board and swing back. Mulligan aggressively for early threats.
Out-value with card draw. Cast spells to trigger Beledros. Pressure with Blech to force interaction.
Track their Beledros and Pest Infestation count. Prioritize targeted removal over sweepers. Win by out-drawing with Pest Infestation and protecting your own Beledros.

common_threats: Watch for board wipes (Wrath of God, Damnation), targeted removal (Path to Exile, Fatal Push), and hand disruption.
Track if they're holding up counters/removal for Blech or Beledros.
